entry.title: Building a Portfolio Site with Vanilla HTML, CSS, and Conway's Game of Life
entry.content: How I built a minimalist developer portfolio with vanilla HTML, CSS, JS, and a Conway's Game of Life canvas background — no frameworks, no build tools, no dependencies.
entry.summary: How I built a minimalist developer portfolio with vanilla HTML, CSS, JS, and a Conway's Game of Life canvas background — no frameworks, no build tools, no dependencies.
